title: calystegia japonica
intro: Calystegia japonica, also known as the Japanese morning glory, is a type of flowering vine native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antispasmodic and sedative effects. The health benefits of Calystegia japonica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Calystegia japonica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and relieve menstrual discomfort.
